titleStmt.title: SII 33.126: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 126. (A.R. No. B 229 of 1950.) Anantarājupalle (hamlet of Komaravōlu), Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Yuva, Āshāḍha śu. 11. • • • • • • • • • .

It registers a gift of land for the amṛitapaḍi service of the god Hanumanta at Gaṇapulapalle by Pina-koṇdappa Nāyudu, son of Veligōṭi Tirupati Nāyudu. The gift land is said to be situated in Komaravōlu, granted as amara to the chief by Raṅgapatirāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yuvasaṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 11 lu śrīmatu velu
gōṭi tirupati nāyyaniṁggāri komāruṁḍu
pinakoṁḍḍapsanāyyaniṁggāru gaṇupulapalle
Anumaṁttunki dānaṁ samarppiṁcci yiccina bhūdāna
darmmaśāsanaṁ . raṁgapatirājugāru māku Amarānki
sāgiṁcciyicina komaravōli pallelalōnu gaṇupu
la pallenu boṁggaraputippa Uttarāna cākalatimmani cē
nistalaṁ 919 tūmeḍu yirusa cēnistala munu
Amurutapaḷaku sāgivacē Aṭugānu yistimigānaka
yī puṇyānaku yavvaru dappinānu gaṁgakarttanu gō
vu brahmaṇa vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru gāḍidi sisinaṁ
kuḍicina pāpānabōvuvāru . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattāna pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēyēt
Digital edition of SII 33.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
